note: Official Vermont Legislature site confirms § 559(a)(2) covers 'transportation of students' supplies/equipment; § 559(a)(3) covers 'a contract for transportation, maintenance, or repair services'; § 559(e)(7) permits renewal without rebidding only where annual cost increase does not exceed the NEEP Cumulative Price Index, total contract growth does not exceed 30 percent, and the agreement 'allows termination by the board following an annual review'; § 559(f) waiver and § 559(g) State-aid-denial language also confirmed. No statutory maximum term is set in § 559.
